initiatives.name: Orlando Community Fridge
initiatives.description: A mutual aid network fostering food justice through community fridges and pantries across Orlando. They coordinate food distribution, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community care, food sovereignty, and creating spaces for collective nourishment and support.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Orlando
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Orlando. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: REAL
initiatives.description: Revolutionary Education & Action League. Based in Florida

initiatives.name: Free Kitchen Orlando
initiatives.description: grassroots food sovereignty program organized by @real.orl

initiatives.name: orlando liberation initiative
initiatives.description: youth, queer, marxist-leninist organization advocating for the liberation of all oppressed peoples

initiatives.name: Seeds of Pine Hills
initiatives.description: Las Semillas Time Bank and Mutual Aid Network is a community based mutual aid cooperative generating power through community action and collaboration.

initiatives.name: SWAN (Stand With Abortion Now)
initiatives.description: As clinic escorts, we volunteer to protect patients from the harassment of nasty, misogynistic, and sometimes violent protestors as they seek family planning services with the support of their doctor.
